message:
chore: ignore .codex-tmp/ directory (Codex IDE temp artifacts)

The .codex-tmp/ directory is created by Codex CLI sessions for
ephemeral build and analysis state and should not be tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -279,3 +279,6 @@ release-artifacts/
 
 # Codex CLI ephemeral target directories
 .codex-target-*/
+
+# Codex temp directory
+.codex-tmp/
